criteria.text: Read-only consent: unauthenticated owner sign-in requests only openid profile offline_access Mail.Read Calendars.Read Tasks.Read Files.Read — no write scopes, no Sites.Read.All/Group.Read.All
Callback stores refresh token + displayName in in-memory session; no token to browser; OAuth code never in bundle/response
Transparent refresh: expired/near-expiry access token refreshed via refresh-token grant with rotation, no user re-prompt
Re-auth flow: refresh-token rejection clears session Graph creds and returns 401 not_authenticated, not 502
Production config: HTTPS redirect URI, pinned MS_TENANT_ID, client secret server-side only via secret seam, never in bundle/response
Audit entry for auth events (consent/refresh/re-auth): who/what/when/outcome, no token/secret/code value
Safe logging on OAuth/refresh errors: event/status/session reference only, never token/secret/code
